mapper.insert: INSERT INTO apply_approval (apply_no, animal_name, user_real_name, user_id, user_phone, apply_time, status, reason) VALUES (#{applyNo}, #{animalName}, #{userRealName}, #{userId}, #{userPhone}, #{applyTime}, #{status}, #{reason})
mapper.update:
UPDATE apply_approval
animal_name = #{animalName},
user_real_name = #{userRealName},
user_id = #{userId},
user_phone = #{userPhone},
status = #{status},
reason = #{reason},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM apply_approval WHERE id IN
#{id}
